name: DiffContext Dependency Analysis Benchmark
methodology:
Each test case consists of:
            1. A Python code snippet or repository
            2. The expected dependency relationships
            3. Evaluation metrics: precision, recall, F1
            
            Unlike traditional benchmarks, we focus on:
            - Real-world code patterns
            - Framework-specific features (decorators, inheritance)
            - Cross-file dependencies
            - Dynamic features (where detectable)

call_detection.description: Finding all function calls and method invocations
